spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 17 to target the new JDK.
spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Java 8 will result in compilation errors or runtime failures due to missing APIs and bytecode incompatibility.

spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version from 1.4.0.RELEASE to 3.3.13.
spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.4 is incompatible with Java 17 and lacks support for modern dependencies; the application will fail to compile or run due to removed APIs and dependency conflicts.

spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency management for spring-data-rest-hal-browser to resolve version conflicts.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for modern string interpolation syntax.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.before:
return String.format(
			"Course [id=%s, name=%s, description=%s, steps=%s]", id, name,

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace String.format with the Java 15+ String.formatted method for cleaner syntax.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.before:
return String.format(
			"Student [id=%s, name=%s, description=%s, courses=%s]", id,

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with lambda DSL configuration required by Spring Security 6.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors if extended.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity configuration to use lambda DSL and requestMatchers instead of deprecated antMatchers.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors; fluent API methods like .and() are removed.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Add import for Customizer.withDefaults required by new Spring Security 6 configuration style.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: withDefaults is used in the new configuration but was not imported, causing compilation error.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 assertions to JUnit 5 Jupiter assertions.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are not part of the JUnit 5 API; using them requires explicit dependency management which is being removed in favor of native JUnit 5 support in Spring Boot 3.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations like @Before and @Test are ignored by the JUnit 5 engine unless the vintage engine is explicitly configured, leading to tests not running.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 runner configuration in favor of Spring Boot's native JUnit 5 support.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses JUnit 5 as the default test engine; @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) is JUnit 4 specific and causes compilation errors or runtime failures if the vintage engine is not present.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot test annotations to match Spring Boot 3 package structure.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: The package org.springframework.boot.context.embedded was removed in Spring Boot 3; the annotation moved to org.springframework.boot.test.web.server.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 assertions to JUnit 5 Jupiter assertions.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are not part of the JUnit 5 API; using them requires explicit legacy dependencies which are being removed or are incompatible with the new test runner setup.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 @Test annotation to JUnit 5 Jupiter @Test annotation.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: The JUnit 4 @Test annotation is not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine without the vintage engine, which is being phased out.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 runner configuration in favor of Spring Boot's native JUnit 5 support.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: SpringRunner is a JUnit 4 runner; Spring Boot 3.x with JUnit 5 uses the SpringExtension automatically, making @RunWith obsolete and potentially causing conflicts if mixed.
